improvements.title: Formula-level obligation compiler
improvements.deliverable: Extract key equations into obligation atoms and make the verifier check explicit formula coverage.
improvements.next_step: Add formula atoms in memory_graph.py and formula-slot checks in payload_compiler.py.

improvements.title: Multi-question generalization study
improvements.evidence: 7 planned batch cases still need complete artifacts.
improvements.deliverable: Run the 7-case default batch and report savings/quality by problem type.
improvements.next_step: Run run_midterm_batch.py with --skip-existing, then rerun both analysis scripts.

improvements.title: Verification payload split
improvements.evidence: Verification can compress less than writer because it carries broad audit context.
improvements.deliverable: Separate answer-contract, evidence-audit, and risk-audit views with role-specific budgets.
improvements.next_step: Add verification subroles and compare token cost against current single verification view.

improvements.title: Repair and candidate calibration
improvements.evidence: 5 repair rounds and 1 broad fallback selections observed.
improvements.deliverable: Use candidate history to tune role profiles and reduce avoidable repair/fallback calls.
improvements.next_step: Log verifier gap types by role and introduce candidate-specific budget thresholds.

improvements.title: Ablation study for research claims
improvements.evidence: Current evidence compares legacy vs PayloadView, but not no-repair/no-license/no-formula variants.
improvements.deliverable: Run full, PayloadView, no-repair, and no-license-gate variants on the same cases.
improvements.next_step: Add an offline ablation harness before adding new model calls.

improvements.title: Traceable demo narrative
improvements.evidence: Existing payload reports contain selected atoms, repairs, and verifier gaps but need narrative packaging.
improvements.deliverable: Create one slide showing problem -> memory graph -> payload view -> judge result.
improvements.next_step: Export one exemplar PayloadView with selected atoms and repair history.
